name: Chocolate Shortbread- Cookie Art
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light and smooth.
2. Add the powdered sugar, cocoa powder, and vanilla extract to the butter. Beat until well combined.
3. Incorporate the flour into the mixture. Work the dough on an unfloured surface until it is smooth and cohesive.
4. Lightly spray a shortbread pan with non-stick cooking spray.
5. Press the dough firmly into the prepared pan, covering the entire surface. Use a fork to prick small holes throughout.
6. Bake in the preheated oven at 325°F (163°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden but not darkened.
7. Allow the shortbread to cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before removing it.
8. Loosen the sides of the pan with a knife and carefully flip the pan onto a wooden cutting board. If necessary, tap one edge of the pan to release the shortbread.
9. Cut into serving pieces while still warm.
Notes:
This recipe uses an earthenware-type decorative shortbread pan made by Brown Bag Cookie Art. Allow the pan to cool before washing.
